_comment: Recommended local-AI models for ClawNex's Quick Setup Card. Updated as the small-model landscape evolves; ship with the codebase so the dashboard can render current recommendations without a network call. The 'recommended' entry is what the QSC suggests by default; 'alternatives' are shown as 'larger / smaller' options.

recommended.name: Llama 3.2 3B
recommended.rationale: Good balance of capability and speed. ClawNex tests its AI features against this model.

alternatives.name: Llama 3.2 1B
alternatives.ramHint: runs on anything modern, including a Raspberry Pi 5
alternatives.rationale: Smallest viable option. Less capable on multi-step reasoning.

alternatives.name: Phi-3 Mini
alternatives.rationale: Microsoft's small-but-capable model. Strong on instruction following.

alternatives.name: Llama 3.1 8B
alternatives.rationale: Significantly more capable for complex security-analysis prompts. Larger memory footprint.
